title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, and delete models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding backends for chains, agents, and RAG.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); chat interface, model manager, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; supports generate, chat, embeddings, model management, and streaming.

title: ollamawrapper
summary: Lightweight Go package that wraps the Ollama REST API for generate/chat/embed operations with context and streaming.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot-style autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in Docker Compose.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to any channel via slash commands with role-based access control.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local LLMs as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive terminal chat client written in Python with conversation history, markdown rendering, and multi-model support.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bot that answers questions using local Ollama models, includes thread support and per-channel model selection.

title: ollama-node-red
summary: Node-RED collection that adds Ollama generate and chat nodes for low-code IoT and automation flows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async HTTP bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ and Unity; chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI-friendly service for testing prompts and embeddings in pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-streamlit
summary: Streamlit UI for document Q&A backed by Ollama embeddings and any local LLM; upload PDFs and chat with them.
